name: picap
description: PiCap: Raspberry Pi packet capture web appliance.

scripts.build:node: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && mkdir -p dist/src && cp -R src/views dist/src/views && cp -R src/public dist/src/public
scripts.build: pnpm run build:node && pnpm run build:client
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && (tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput & TSC_PID=$!; trap 'kill $TSC_PID' EXIT INT TERM; node --env-file=.env --watch --watch-preserve-output dist/src/server.js)
